summary: A Go-based orchestration framework leveraging MCP for runner and schema validation, currently undergoing heavy automated test expansion.
concerns: proliferation of agent-specific test directories (GOrchestra/glm-agents/*) suggests brittle test generation
high volume of _extra_test.go files indicates potential test duplication or fragmented coverage
uncommitted modified and staged files in an active session state
suggestions: consolidate fragmented extra tests into the main test suites to reduce maintenance burden
review and stabilize the GOrchestra agent generation workflow to prevent directory sprawl
commit or stash the pending changes to establish a clean baseline before further development
